subcodes.first_line: Glorified be He Who hath sent down the verses in truth unto a people who understand. There is no God but Him; His is the creation and the command, and all through His bidding [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: فسبحان الذی نزل الایات بالحق لقوم یعلمون و ما من اله الا هو له الخلق و الامر و کل بامره
subcodes.subjects: @proclamation to people of the Bayan, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @acquiescence and resignation; contentment, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
